title: WolverVerse
description: The official modpack for the WolverVerse server. Capture, Train and befriend hundreds of Pokemon!
body:
The official Modpack for the WolverVerse Cobblemon Fabric Server, now on Modrinth!

Runing on Minecraft 1.21.1, and Cobblemon 1.7.1, designed to be a fun and relaxing environment for all to enjoy.

I have added many mods to this pack to try and make the server as interesting as possible, and to keep you invested! 

Including many mods, such as Mega Evolutions, Variable sizes, Lootr, gts, wondertrade, Shiny days, RTP, Warps, Mining dimensions and many more.

Included is the WolverVerse resource pack which includes several Christmas themed skins for Abra-Kadabra-Alakazam, Ekans, Falinks, Murkrow and Cyclizar.

Always open to suggestions for improvements!
